EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} viewed the file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} modified the file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view the file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to modify the file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
